calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together: PCN-11-294281 Conservatorship of Cannizzaro & PTR-13-296570 In Re Salvatore Cannizzaro.
Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Thomas Lucas.

The Court stated that this is a first and final account for final distribution in the trust case and a 3rd and final account and termination in the conservatorship case, that it has no problem with the fee request, that its question goes to what the petition is asking in regards to the liens and judgments and that it is not clear why they need to be converted. Mr. Schultz stated that they reviewed the papers and did some research and that they probably do not need to be converted. The Court granted the accounting petitions in each case (subject to receipt/review of revised orders that simplify things down to allowing the fees as a lien.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
